description: Tracks all QA cycles, coding tasks, and bug fixes across the Orchestrator → Coding Agent → QA Agent loop.

cycles.name: Unit Tests Baseline
cycles.summary: 10 unit tests written and all passing

cycles.name: E2E Baseline
cycles.summary: 16/17 pass — DIAG-T08 failed (wrong URL + header + no timeout)

cycles.name: Fix DIAG-T08
cycles.summary: Fixed wrong API path, wrong auth header, missing timeout in form-diagnosis.spec.ts

cycles.name: Full Suite + New Tests
cycles.summary: 23/24 — REG-03 failed (wrong test expectation, not a code bug)

cycles.name: Fix REG-03 expectation
cycles.summary: Corrected test expectation: phone not-found correctly returns 404, not 200

cycles.name: Conditional Field Visibility Fixes
cycles.summary: Fixed 3 conditional UI rendering bugs in EnergyCertificateSection.tsx: shutterWindowCount, airConditioningDetails+Type, solarPanelDetails were always rendered; now correctly gated by parent toggles.

cycles.name: Write Conditional Visibility Tests (COND-01/02/03 + UNIT-COND-01..06)
cycles.summary: Wrote E2E tests (COND-01, COND-02, COND-03) and unit tests (UNIT-COND-01..06) verifying the 3 conditional visibility fixes. Also added E2E-FLOW-01 and E2E-FLOW-02.

cycles.name: QA Cycle 5 — Conditional Visibility Verification
cycles.summary: Locator issues surfaced during run — superseded by Cycle 6 which includes all fixes.

cycles.name: EC Flow + Locator Fixes
cycles.summary: All 29 E2E + 23 unit tests passing after fixing YesNoField locators, spinbutton locators, and door/window section locators. E2E-FLOW-01 and E2E-FLOW-02 added and passing.

cycles.name: Production Readiness + Bug Fixes
cycles.summary: Added helmet, CORS restriction, rate limiting, global error handler, startup env-var validation. Fixed submit stuck, slow submission, data loss on refresh, false save warnings, international phone support, driving licence rejection. Added useLocalStorageBackup + useBeforeUnloadSave. Fixed SignedDocumentPreview to use 0.25-scale render + useDebounce + template preloading.

cycles.name: Production Readiness + Text Overlay Fix
cycles.summary: 56/56 tests passing. Backend security hardened, frontend performance fixed, API + mobile E2E tests added.

cycles.name: E2E-FLOW-03 + E2E-FLOW-04 + Signature PDF Readability
cycles.summary: Added E2E-FLOW-03 (EC resume path) and E2E-FLOW-04 (follow-up path routing) with 4 new backend test endpoints. Added tap-to-expand fullscreen modal for signature documents (DocumentFullscreenModal + renderSignedDocumentModalPreview at 0.5 scale). Fixed DASH-01/DASH-02 (already implemented — confirmed). Added ELT20250005 seed project.

cycles.name: E2E Flow Tests + Signature Readability Verification
cycles.summary: 58/58 tests passing (35 E2E + 23 unit). All PRD acceptance criteria covered. Task queue empty. Project production-ready.

bugs.description: Auth header was x-token — should be x-project-token
Test expected HTTP 200 for not-found phone; backend correctly returns 404
shutterWindowCount field always rendered regardless of hasShutters value — should only show when hasShutters === true
airConditioningDetails + airConditioningType (¿Tipo de Bomba?) always rendered — should only show when hasAirConditioning === true
solarPanelDetails textarea always rendered — should only show when hasSolarPanels === true
